docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT TURO
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY BENSON, BRITTANY AS TO DEFENDANT TURO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-27-2017 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-27-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-27-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF BRITTANY BENSON APPEARED. DEFENDANT TURO APPEARED, REPRESENTED BY DIANNA NGUYEN, CLAIMS SPECIALIST. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL, CLERK: A. MOK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-27-2017 - JUDGMENT.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, THE JUDGMENT HAS BEEN FULLY PAID OR SATISFIED AS TO ALL JUDGMENT DEBTORS. AS TO DEFENDANT TURO
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE $0.00 SERVED JUN-07-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT TURO

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BENSON, BRITTANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TURO $389.88 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $464.88 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
